title: AI is cursing renters with the promise of impossible homes
slides: AI promises your dream home—but it doesn't exist.
Rental platforms now generate listings from scratch.
These phantom apartments never pass a physical inspection.
You waste hours applying for units that aren't real.
Always verify addresses before scheduling a tour.
thread_text:
Your dream home is fake.

A rental platform in Italy used AI to list apartments that never existed. One had a pool on the fifth floor.

The AI made them from scratch.

It generated photos, floor plans, and descriptions. No human ever saw the property.

They vanish before you visit.

By the time you schedule a tour, the listing is gone. The landlord never answers.

You waste hours for nothing.

One victim applied to 12 units in a weekend. All were generated by the same bot.

Check the address first.

Open Google Maps. Does the building match the photos? If not, don't apply.

thread:
Your dream home is fake.

A rental platform in Italy used AI to list apartments that never existed. One had a pool on the fifth floor.

The AI made them from scratch.

It generated photos, floor plans, and descriptions. No human ever saw the property.

They vanish before you visit.

By the time you schedule a tour, the listing is gone. The landlord never answers.

You waste hours for nothing.

One victim applied to 12 units in a weekend. All were generated by the same bot.

Check the address first.

Open Google Maps. Does the building match the photos? If not, don't apply.

instagram.caption:
You spent your weekend applying to 12 apartments. Every single one was generated by the same AI bot. None of them exist.

A rental platform in Italy let AI write listings from scratch—fake photos, fake floor plans, even a pool on the fifth floor. The units vanish before you can tour them, and the “landlord” never answers 📞

Every minute you spend applying to a phantom listing is a minute lost that you can’t get back.

Before you hit “apply,” open Google Maps. Does the building match the photo? 🏢 If not, close the tab and walk away.

Photos, floor plans, descriptions all generated by AI. No human ever saw the property it pictured.
You schedule a visit, but the listing disappears. The landlord never answers or exists.
